HistoryResponse.description: One row from risk_history — a single field change at a point in time.
HistoryResponse.title: HistoryResponse

LoginResponse.description: Returned after a successful login. Tokens are in HTTP-only cookies, not here.
LoginResponse.title: LoginResponse

ResponseType.description: The four NIST-standard risk response strategies.
ResponseType.title: ResponseType

RiskOwnerSummary.description: Minimal owner info embedded in RiskResponse — avoids a second API call.
RiskOwnerSummary.title: RiskOwnerSummary

RiskUpdate.description:
All fields are Optional so callers send only what changed.
model_dump(exclude_unset=True) in the service layer ensures we only
update columns that were actually included in the request body.
RiskUpdate.title: RiskUpdate

info.description: Cybersecurity Risk Register API -- NIST 800-30 aligned
info.title: Firewatch

get.description: List the calling user's API keys (no plaintext returned).

schema.title: Response List Api Keys Api Api Keys Get

post.description: Create a new API key for the calling user. Plaintext is shown ONCE.

get.description: Admin-only: every API key in the system, with owner info.

schema.title: Response List All Api Keys Api Api Keys All Get

delete.description: Revoke a key. Owners self-serve; admins can revoke any key.

post.description: Let an authenticated local user change their own password.

schema.title: Response Change Password Api Auth Change Password Post

post.description:
Validate email + password. On success, write HTTP-only auth cookies
and return the user's basic info (no token in the response body).

Clear both auth cookies. The tokens remain valid until expiry server-side,
but the client can no longer send them.

get.description: Return the currently authenticated user's profile.

post.description:
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token.
Called automatically by the frontend when a 401 is received.

schema.title: Response Refresh Api Auth Refresh Post

post.description: Receive a Security Event Token (SET) from the IdP and apply the event.

schema.title: Response Caep Receiver Api Auth Sso Caep Post

get.description: Exchange the authorization code for tokens, validate the id_token, sign the user in.
Public — frontend uses this to decide whether to render the SSO button.

schema.title: Response Sso Config Api Auth Sso Config Get

get.description: Kick off the OIDC authorization-code+PKCE flow.

post.description: Run the daily scheduler tick synchronously. Idempotent per-day.

schema.title: Response Run Tick Api Internal Tick Post

get.description: Download all risks visible to the current user as a CSV file.

post.description: Bulk-create risks from an uploaded CSV. Errors are reported per row.

get.description: Download a CSV template (header + one example row) for risk import.

delete.description: Soft-delete a risk. Admin only. The record is retained for audit purposes.

post.description: Add a new scoring assessment to an existing risk.
Add a response/mitigation plan to a risk.

schema.title: Response Resource Types Api Scim V2 Resourcetypes Get
Response Schemas Endpoint Api Scim V2 Schemas Get
Response Service Provider Config Api Scim V2 Serviceproviderconfig Get

get.description: List users. Admin only. Pass ?include_inactive=true to include deactivated accounts.

schema.title: Response List Users Api Users Get

post.description:
Create a new user account. Admin only.
The plain-text password never touches the database — it's hashed here.

get.description:
Users available for risk ownership assignment.

Excludes executive_viewers — they have a read-only role and aren't valid
risk owners. Accessible to admins and security analysts since those are the
only roles that can change a risk's owner_id via the API.

Note: this route MUST appear before any /{user_id} routes so FastAPI does
not interpret the literal string "assignable" as a user ID.

schema.title: Response List Assignable Users Api Users Assignable Get

patch.description: Reactivate a previously deactivated user account. Admin only.

Deactivate a user (soft disable — preserves all their risk history).
An admin cannot deactivate themselves.
Change a local user's role. Admin only.

schema.title: Response List Subscriptions Api Webhooks Get

post.description: Fire a synthetic firewatch.test event at this subscription only.

schema.title: Response Fire Test Api Webhooks  Sub Id  Test Post

get.description:
Returns 200 OK if the app is running.
Used by Docker, load balancers, and uptime monitors.
Does not check database connectivity (keep it fast).
